item.title: Go me :)
item.description: Best choice ever
item.dc:creator: flipklein

item.title: March weight loss check-in
item.description: For those of you who are following, I’m just about at my goal! I’ve got about 5-8 lbs to go before I’m fully comfortable maintaining. It’s crazy looking back and seeing what I used to look like, I hardly recognize myself anymore. I want to be transparent as possible, so I will say I’ve been slacking a bit on the gym, but that’s just a part of the journey. I am interested in building a bit of muscle once I hit my goal, so I’ll take recommendations on what exercises are best for that if you all have some. For reference, I was about 210 lbs in the first photo (taken 4/26/23), and I’m 133 in the second photo (taken today).
item.dc:creator: bunniebby

item.dc:creator: Joyika

item.title: I got a call!! Finally!!
item.description:
The shelter just called and they have some kittens for me to foster! A mama and her three newborn babies. I’ve been without kittens for four months so I am SO excited!! (Update: https://imgur.com/gallery/h1X2lOm )
Two little cream and white boys and a beautiful calico girl. They look to be about a week old.
Mama is a GORGEOUS Flame Point Siamese. I’ve never had one with her coloration before! Once I get them home, I’ll give mama a few hours to settle in before trying to take better pictures. I’m stoked!!
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: The 417th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps -- ND & Therapy Memes ep 7
item.description:
A lot of us are going to feel attacked by some of these MeeMays. Full disclosure, I'm diagnosed with Depression, ADHD, OCD and ASD. I'm also pretty sure I have APD
No weepy when I'm asleepy!
For me, the Righty-Tighty and Don't Trip Over Stuff sections are switched with the Puns and Memes sections
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
I can't believe she waits that long for the crisis part.
I'm Punctual, Funny and Only Slightly Evil.
My edit at the bottom
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #MemeDump #NeuroDivergent #Therapy #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple

item.title: Still chasing the dream I cannot catch
item.description: I would love to have my own private animal rescue so no animal would be unloved or homeless or abused. As for a home for myself I would love a Hobbit house or a log cabin !
item.dc:creator: JustaRandomCanadianFemale

item.title: It's my cake day! Enjoy some stuff I stole from Imgur
item.description:
It's dignity, Louann!
Oy! Mister Prime Minister!
Garrus is the best.
100%
Any time I had a problem, I just threw a Molotov cocktail. Then, I had a different problem!
100%
*sob*
Highly recommend the Libby app! (Or Overdrive, depending on your area.) Library ebooks and audiobooks!
100% Most Viral edit: Apparently my emoji comments didn't go through, but I am glad to have sparked such a great debate about pop, soda, coke, Pepsi, fizz, etc! Have a great day all!
item.dc:creator: missannelk

item.title: A Small Dump and A Request
item.description: *Edit - Thank you everyone for sending me kind words, memes, and enough monies to pay for my meds. I love all you guys so much! If you made it this far, thank you for reading. I do have but one request, I'm looking for anyone to help me out by sending a few dollars to my wonderful partner's CashApp or Venmo. I'm trying to purchase my needed medications, though I no longer have the money cause I had to put that money towards my past due on my mother's internet bill to keep it from being shut off. My partner does WFH and absolutely needs the internet to do get her job done so I made that sacrifice. I'm not in the greatest mental space and the thought of having to go through 2 weeks of painful withdrawal symptoms is pushing me to my limit. Any amount helps, if you'd like to send us any, just DM and I'll get you a link. If not, it's all good, I would appreciate an upvote to get more visibility. I've been a lurker since 2011 and finally made my account in 2016, I love this little community and I've seen you help so many people.
item.dc:creator: FrenziiTheSuccubus

item.title: Stewie the day he was born
item.description: This is Stewie when the day he was born and also the day we got him. He looks sort of yellow-ish because his mom rejected him and did not clean him after he was born. He’s all clean and comfy now, and also very loved!

item.dc:creator: bennythered

item.title: Lies are coming to an end
item.description: I had a fight with my partner for the last time. We always go in circles and make up afterwards then pretend like it's allOK. I realized in our decade together I allowed so many things that I did not agree with. Pretended to be ok with things that hurt me and chose to supress the way I felt so that they would be ok. I was OK with sacrificing my reality to keep up the image that I wasOK. I started to feel like two people, one that was helpful and another that didnt want to be around anyone. This past month I stopped lying and being honest about how I feel and it feels great to not hold it in. BUT is also changed how I feel to the core about my partner that i no longer want to even be around. I feel him trying to reconnect and I just can't accept it. I am planning to move on and feel so scared but it feels like a relief and as though it's the truth I have been avoiding. I have been trying to leave almost every year and instinctually if feels like the right thing to do. I have started to create a support group of people that just want to see me happy and it highlights even more how suppressed I feel here. I know it Is something I did and contributed to by lying for so long and it hurts me to know that it will hurt him, but I need to be honest to myself so that I don't let this happen again. I will not live a lie any longer.
item.dc:creator: OrangeMoon69

item.title: A narrow side street in Tenby, Wales
item.dc:creator: Joyika

item.title: What is this, a crossover episode? (Yes it is. Come get a dump of geeky crossovers)
item.description:
Damn, Roy is looking smug there. Something I truly love is crossovers of different media franchises. I've been collecting a bunch of these and decided to share them. Let me know what's your favorite, or share one you love that isn't here. (Avatar the Last Airbender x Full Metal Alchemist)
Honestly, considering how many options there are in Mario Kart, I'm kinda surpised we haven't seen the Akira bike in there yet. (Mario x Akira)
Watch what you say or else they'll put out your lights! (Lord of the Rings x Robin Hood: Men in Tights)
And unlike the Black Knight, Anakin just came back for more. (Star Wars x Monty Python and the Holy Grail)
She ain't afraid of no spirits! (Spirited Away x Ghostbusters)
That boy ain't right. And why does he break every pot he sees?! (The Legend of Zelda x King of the Hill)
I still remember the theater going wild when Pippin brought out the second lightsaber for the first time. (Lord of the Rings x Star Wars)
Sometimes you just have be a little creative and find a workaround. (Aladdin x Dragonball Z)
I wonder what would have happened if they switched places... (Scooby Doo x Doctor Who)
It's that last second where Tarkin looks up at Vader that gets me with this. (Star Wars x The Princess Bride)
"What about his legs? He doesn't need those!" "Looks like gingerbread is back on the menu, boys!" (Lord of the Rings x Shrek)
The Lin Kuei were no match for the true queen of cryomancy.
It's a big club, it's got a lot of room. (Rick and Morty x Gravity Falls)
Give Bowser credit, he gets shit done. (Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles x Super Mario)
These younglings had even less of a chance than the ones in Revenge of the Sith. (Sesame Streey x Star Wars x Shrek)
Katara was not ready for that reincarnation/regeneration! (Avatar the Last Airbender x Doctor Who)
Wash was not prepared for Smeagol's reaction to the Precious. (Lord of the Rings x Firefly)
Two legends of the 70s face off. Who win triumph?! (Bruce Lee vs the Silly Walks from Monty Python)
It's just too bad that Thor's scar is on the wrong side. (MCU x Avatar)
I bet Godzilla likes it extra crispy. (Godzilla x Ghostbusters)
This is how Sauron would have handled things if he was smart. Just have a mandolorian bring the Hobbit in warm. (Star Wars x Lord of the Rings)
The dimensions of this TARDIS change even more than most! (Transformers x Doctor Who)
Yeah, that plot point in Korra never made much sense. (The Legend of Korra x The Emperor's New Groove)
I love putting a new spin on classic memes, especially when you combine them.
The Witch King can try to get across, but I don't think that's going to work for him. (Lord of the Rings x The Mummy)
I bet it wasn't even a hard hunt. (Predator x the James Cameron Avatar movies)
I'm not even sure if this counts as a crossover, but what the heck. (The Simpsons x Futurama)
I never thought Thomas would fall to Chaos... (Thomas & Friends x Warhammer 40K)
Do you have that one friend who completely changes when they start drinking? (Lord of the Rings x Pirates of the Carribean)
Who is the true master of evil, Hunson Abadeer or Aku? (Adventure Time x Samurai Jack)
The past and the present can look so different. (Barbie x Bladerunner 2049)
Willie's going to make you say more than "Oh bother" by the time he's done... (The Simpsons x Winnie the Pooh)
Maybe he made a wrong turn at Albuquerque? (Saw x The Shining)
I never expected Mercury to wear the Saiyan Armor, but they do share a color scheme... (Dragonball Z x Sailor Moon)
They and their swords will be Skyward when they strike. (The Legend of Zelda x Attack on Titan)
Deadpool and Harley would have a hell of a time together.
Beats being a newt. (Star Trek x Monty Python and the Holy Grail)
Unless Flynn wants to climb up on Saruman's beard... (Lord of the Rings x Rapunzel)
This convention would have so many stories to tell each other.
Chun-Li went after the wrong car on the pier. (Street Fight x Transformers)
Link is probably there like "You have two hearts? I never have less than three!" (Legend of Zelda x Doctor Who)
None of these sorts of dumps are complete with Gadget dressed as Kaylee. (Firefly x Chip and Dale Rescue Rangers)
Not actually a crossover, but I decided to throw it in just for fun and the hell of it. Hope you had fun. What was your favorite, or do you know a really good one that should have been here?
item.dc:creator: politicalwanderer
